description: A plain (non-render) function iterating a reactive cell with `for (let p of @unitParts)` is a PLAIN LOOP over the cell's current snapshot — NOT a DOM list-render (GitHub #23 / SPEC §17.4: the list-render form requires a `lift` in the body). unitLabelFor returns the matched field or "none"; adding a part re-renders the snapshot-reading interpolations.
rationale: §17.4 a for-of is a Tier-0 list-render ONLY when its body lifts markup; a for-of in a plain function body iterates the reactive cell's current value and returns a result. #found reads unitLabelFor("B2") -> "B2" (matched); #missing reads unitLabelFor("C3") -> "none" then, after one add-click appends {id:3,unit:"C3"}, re-renders to "C3" off the new snapshot.
